chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 573 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Main Case. 2. For orders on CMA 2735/2024. 15.12.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for the applicant. Pursuant to order dated 08.12.2025, learned counsel for the applicant states under instructions that instant reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969 Judge Judge M. Khan
